items.title: Bill Gates Issues Warning on AI Investment Hype, Urges Caution
items.description: Bill Gates on Wednesday warned the AI industry will be "hypercompetitive," and that "a reasonable percentage" of today's pricey tech stocks will lose a lot of their value.
